[Rhonda L.](https://www.yelp.com/biz/deluxe-windows-burlingame-3?hrid=PpJtxQp5UXBGIJCoUhqEuA)

May 14

Replacing condo windows on a busy boulevard in San Francisco is complex with many moving parts. I outlined the scope of the job gathering and researching the following entities before committing dollars to the project: Review CC&R Restrictions and getting HOA approval Identifying restrictions and window standards with the San Francisco Planning Department Identifying a Window Vendor with a bonded and insured Licensed Contractor with favorable reviews in the installation of the windows. I gathered quotes from (4) window companies comparing apples to apples after reading every review. What the other companies did not disclose was the complexity of installing fire rate windows except for Deluxe Window. Felix is not just a salesman but one with decades of knowledge and experience in the field. Felix disclosed that I would need scaffolding to install (3) fire rated windows and that the custom order would take 16 weeks for build. Also, that I would need written permission from my neighbor to add the scaffolds to reach my unit on the fourth floor. I appreciated the honesty with potential road blocks that can be resolved and dealt with early on in the project with open communication. None of the other companies that came out to quote me disclosed this information. Deluxe estimates were in line and comparable. Throughout the project, I was in constant communication with Darja who sent email outlining steps to guide me through the process from billing, materials, deadlines and installation. 16 weeks sounds like a long time to build windows but Fyre Tec windows are quality worth the wait. I also went with Anlin single hung windows for the ease of cleaning and life time warranty transfers. My installation took three days to complete with installer George paying close attention to details in water proofing, sealant, foam installation, caulking and trimming the frames. The City Building Inspector signed off to continue work and the second appointment to get final sign off of the permit went through without a hitch. The project was work but Deluxe Windows and the company's competent staff mentioned above help make this into a successful work in progress to final completion. The Deluxe staff were there to answer every and all of my questions. The windows look fabulous and sound proofing has helped minimize the busy street noise.

I recently had the pleasure of working with Deluxe Windows, and I couldn't be happier with the results. From start to finish, the team was incredibly skilled and professional. Their attention to detail and craftsmanship really stood out, making the entire process smooth and stress-free. One of the things that impressed me most was their efficiency. With just two installers, they managed to install 13 windows and one sliding door in only a day and a half! Despite working quickly, the quality was top-notch, and everything was completed perfectly. On top of their excellent work, Deluxe Windows also offered very competitive pricing, making the whole experience feel like an incredible value. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for high-quality window installation coupled with outstanding service.

### Which material is best for your windows?

The best window material depends on your home's style, climate, energy efficiency needs, and budget. We offer a variety of options like vinyl, wood, aluminum, and fiberglass — each with its own benefits.

To find the perfect fit for your home, we recommend speaking with one of our experts. Contact us today for a personalized consultation

### Is consultation for free?

To get a free consultation, please fill out the [form](https://www.deluxewindows.com/#).

### When do I need new windows?

If you aren't sure whether your windows need replacing, Deluxe Windows, Inc. can come to your home for a free consultation.

### How to choose windows brands and styles?

The answer to this question can only be answered once we come to your home for a free consultation. Every home is different, and when our professional window replacement specialist comes out to assess your house, we can factor in all the different aspects to suggest which product, style and price range will work best for you.
